item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
jq -e '. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"platform-migrations\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'exact_final_plan=PASS\\n'
for token in 'Schema version "'`1`'"' '"'`canary` strategy'"' 'batch size "'`25`'"' 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' 'owner is "'`platform-migrations`'"'; do rg -F -- \""'$token" "$docs" >/dev/null; done
rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs" >/dev/null
printf '"'final_docs_agreement=PASS\\n'
if rg -n -uu 'big_bang|big-bang|data-platform' \""'$root"; then exit 1; fi
printf '"'superseded_values_absent=PASS\\n'
actual="'$(find "$root" -type f | sed "s#''^$root/##" | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' 'docs/migration.md' 'migration/plan.json' | sort)
test \""'$actual" = "$expected"
printf '"'final_inventory=PASS count:2 unrequested:0\\n'
printf 'FINAL_COMPLETION_CHECK_EXIT=0\\n'"
